title: Nested case results in message: "Predicate CASE 42: time to implement some more"
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE t (c INTEGER, d TEXT, e BOOLEAN);
INSERT INTO t (c, d, e) VALUES (1, 'test', 1), (2, 'example', 0);
CREATE TABLE u (f INTEGER PRIMARY KEY, g REAL);
SELECT CASE WHEN (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM t WHERE d = 'test') > 0 THEN (CASE t.c WHEN 1 THEN 10 ELSE 20 END) ELSE 30 END FROM t;
key_bug_features: Nested CASE statement with invalid condition evaluation
